Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION

Title: Relates to food service item waste reduction
Summary: Prohibits public food service establishments operating in the state from providing excess food service items including single-use utensils, condiments, napkins and extra containers, to any customer except upon, and in accordance with, the express request of that customer.
LawCode: Add Art 27 Title 34 §§27-3401 - 27-3407, En Con L; amd §92-s, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the environmental conservation law and the state finance law, in relation to food service item waste reduction
